name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to Taber's behavior or UI
labels: enhancement

## Problem

<!-- What current behavior is missing or painful? Describe the user situation, not just the solution. -->

## Proposal

<!-- The smallest change that would solve the problem. Keep the tool boundary narrow. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you consider and why is this one better. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] Does not widen the tool boundary.
- [ ] Does not change posted permissions (`wxt.config.ts`) for the store build.
- [ ] Does not expose raw chain-of-thought or reasoning.
- [ ] Compatible with `docs/store-compliance.md`.
